transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Riverside Family Health scheduling line. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Amaro. It's currently for this Thursday.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Can I get your name and date of birth?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Lena Ortiz, March 4th, 1985. Also, I've been having chest pain and getting short of breath the last two days, just so you know.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, thanks Lena. What day would you like to move the appointment to instead?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Maybe next Tuesday afternoon? The chest tightness is worse when I walk up stairs.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I have Tuesday at 2:15pm or 3:45pm available with Dr. Amaro. Which works better?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, you're confirmed for Tuesday at 2:15pm. Would you like a text reminder the day before?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're all set, Lena. Anything else I can help you with today?
